# Beckhoff.TwinCAT.HMI.Industries.Common

This package provides common utilities and components for industrial TwinCAT HMI applications.

## Usage

Add `Beckhoff.TwinCAT.HMI.Industries.Common` to your TwinCAT HMI project to access shared features and helpers for industrial solutions.

## Documentation

For detailed usage and configuration, refer to the [Beckhoff TwinCAT HMI documentation](https://infosys.beckhoff.de/content/1033/te2000_tc3_hmi_engineering/index.html).
